Ser mãe de vocês é um milagre, é a melhor coisa que poderia ter acontecido comigo exatamente do jeito que aconteceu. Vocês dois são mais uma prova de Deus na minha vida, e é só por vocês que eu vivo hoje.  Obrigada por fortalecer em minha fé, e por me mostrarem que eu tenho uma capacidade imensa de amar que eu nem sabia que era possível 🤍
O Segredo da vida é confiar no processo 🤲🫰
Exercício do espelho 🪞 Magic ✨ @liferesetschool

Absolutamente todas as pessoas que eu conheco vêm elogiar Ornella pra mim.  E pessoas que eu não conheço, vêm até mim pra falar bem da Ornella tambem.  Desde o dia que ela nasceu, ha 34 anos, aonde eu vou, alguem da um jeito de elogiar ela pra mim.  Então, independente do ponto de vista, do momento q estiveram com ela, da fase, do lugar, da circunstancia, absolutamente todo mundo que esteve perto, muito perto, ou simplesmente trocou um sorriso (pq ela sorri 24h por dia então seria a unica opção) vai falar como Ornella é diferente, um carisma que  seria cansativo manter se nao fosse totalmente real.  Ela é o amor em pessoa, a médica mais humana no sentido literal da palavra, aquela que todo paciente merecia ter.  Ela trouxe meus dois filhos pro mundo e jaja teremos eles dois tambem testemunhando a benção que é ter uma Ornella na vida!  Agradeço pela sua existencia, porque todo mundo que cruza seu caminho é mais feliz!  Te amo 🎈🤍 15/04
A regra é: só pega o controle, se você pode controlar! De resto: SOLTA! Vem pro @liferesetschool

entity_data.img_caption: The image shows a person with long, straight blonde hair wearing a light pink sweatshirt with a graphic design on the front. The design features a cartoon character holding a teddy bear and some text below it. The background appears to be a cozy indoor setting, possibly a living room or bedroom, with a bed visible behind the person. There is a framed picture hanging on the wall above the bed. The text overlay on the image reads "Quanto mais você reclama, pior fica" which translates to "The more you complain, the worse it gets." The logo "liferereset" is also visible at the top of the image.

The image shows a person with long, straight blonde hair sitting at a table in what appears to be a kitchen or dining area. The individual is wearing a gray sweatshirt and has a tattoo on their left wrist. They are holding a glass cup of cappuccino close to their mouth, seemingly about to take a sip. The background includes a light blue wall, a white countertop, and some decorative items such as a potted plant with yellow flowers and a few bottles on a shelf. The text "Cappuccino saudável" is overlaid on the image, which translates to "Healthy cappuccino" in English.

entity_data.ocr_text:
```markdown
# Rainbow Over the Field

![Rainbow Over the Field](attachment://rainbow_over_the_field.jpg)
```
entity_data.img_caption:
The image depicts a serene outdoor scene featuring a modern, minimalist design. The foreground is dominated by a stone-paved patio area with a smooth, reflective surface. A small, rectangular table with a metal frame and a glass top is positioned near the edge of the patio, adding a touch of elegance to the setting.

In the background, there is a large, rectangular swimming pool that extends into the distance. The pool's edge is lined with lush greenery, including tall grasses and shrubs, which add a natural element to the otherwise man-made landscape. Beyond the pool, the view opens up to a vast, open field with golden-yellow crops, suggesting a rural or agricultural setting.

A prominent feature of the image is a vibrant rainbow arching across the sky, its colors vividly contrasting against the overcast clouds. The rainbow spans from the left side of the image towards the right, creating a striking focal point and adding a sense of wonder and beauty to the scene.

Overall, the image captures a tranquil moment in a picturesque outdoor space, blending natural elements with modern architecture and a beautiful natural phenomenon.

entity_data.ocr_text:
```markdown
# Double Rainbow Over a Stone Patio

- **Foreground:**
  - Stone patio with irregularly shaped stones.
  - Lanterns on either side of the patio.
  
- **Middle Ground:**
  - Swimming pool with a stone edge.
  - Greenery and bushes lining the pool area.
  
- **Background:**
  - Rolling hills and fields.
  - Trees and vegetation in the distance.
  - A wooden structure or pavilion partially visible.
  
- **Sky:**
  - Cloudy sky with a double rainbow spanning across it.
```
entity_data.img_caption:
The image depicts an outdoor scene featuring a double rainbow arching across the sky, creating a stunning visual effect. The ground is covered with a stone-paved patio area, which appears to be made of variously colored stones arranged in a pattern. The patio extends towards a swimming pool that is partially visible on the right side of the image.

In the background, there is a lush landscape with green fields and trees, suggesting a rural or countryside setting. The sky is overcast, with clouds diffusing the sunlight, which is essential for the formation of rainbows. The double rainbow adds a magical touch to the scene, highlighting the beauty of nature after a rainfall.

On the left side of the image, part of a wooden structure, possibly a gazebo or a pergola, is visible, adding to the serene and picturesque atmosphere of the location. The overall mood of the image is peaceful and tranquil, capturing a moment of natural wonder.

entity_data.ocr_text:
```markdown
# Rainbow Over Fields

![Rainbow](attachment://rainbow.jpg)

The image shows a vibrant rainbow arching across the sky, with fields and trees in the background.
```
entity_data.img_caption:
The image depicts a stunning natural scene featuring a vibrant double rainbow arching across the sky. The rainbow is prominently displayed, with its vivid colors of red, orange, yellow, green, blue, and indigo clearly visible. The sky above is filled with dark, heavy clouds, suggesting recent or ongoing rainfall that created the conditions for the rainbow.

In the foreground, there is a well-maintained hedge or fence, which adds a structured element to the otherwise natural landscape. Beyond the hedge, the terrain transitions into a gently rolling landscape with patches of greenery and open fields. The fields appear to be agricultural, with some areas showing signs of cultivation or grazing. In the distance, there is a line of trees, possibly eucalyptus, which add depth and texture to the scene.

The overall atmosphere of the image is serene and picturesque, capturing the beauty of nature after a rain shower. The combination of the rainbow, the cloudy sky, and the lush landscape creates a harmonious and tranquil setting.

The image depicts a person standing on a grassy path in a park-like setting, with their arms outstretched towards a stunning double rainbow arching across the sky. The person is wearing a green shirt and shorts, and appears to be enjoying the moment. The background features a mix of trees and open fields, with the sky transitioning from a soft pinkish hue near the horizon to a lighter blue higher up. The overall scene conveys a sense of joy and wonder, capturing the beauty of nature and the simple pleasure of being outdoors.

entity_data.ocr_text: A importância de COMEMORAR pequenas VITÓRIAS
entity_data.img_caption: The image features a minimalist design with a light green background. At the center of the image, there is a golden balloon floating upwards. The balloon is shiny and reflective, giving it a glossy appearance. Below the balloon, there is text written in Portuguese. The text reads: "A importância de COMEMORAR pequenas VITÓRIAS." This translates to "The importance of celebrating small victories" in English. The text is white and positioned centrally below the balloon, making it stand out against the light green background. The overall design is simple and elegant, focusing on the message conveyed by the text.

entity_data.ocr_text: Não facilite a vida dos outros, se tiver que dificultar a sua.
entity_data.img_caption:
The image features a text in Portuguese that reads: "Não facilite a vida dos outros, se tiver que dificultar a sua." This translates to English as "Do not make life easier for others if you have to make it harder for yours."

The background of the image is a textured beige color, giving it a rustic and simple appearance. The text is centered and written in a clear, black font, making it easy to read against the light background. The overall design is minimalistic and straightforward, focusing solely on the message conveyed by the text.

entity_data.img_caption:
The image features a wooden sign with black text on it, set against a dark, textured background that appears to be part of a painting or mural. The sign reads:

```
SAIBA A DIFERENÇA
ENTRE ESPERAR E PERDER TEMPO

This translates from Portuguese to:

```
KNOW THE DIFFERENCE
BETWEEN WAITING AND LOSING TIME

The sign is mounted on a wooden frame, and the background includes some abstract elements, possibly representing a night scene with lights and shadows. The overall aesthetic suggests a rustic or artistic setting.

The post is enclosed within a white rectangular box that has rounded corners. The background behind the text box is a gradient of colors, starting with a light blue at the top and transitioning to a darker blue, then to a purple, and finally to a pink at the bottom. The overall design is simple and clean, focusing on the text and the gradient background.

entity_data.publication_caption: Um dia a gente percebe que os nossos pais também estavam tentando… e isso é libertador!

Reclamar até alivia na hora… mas te mantém estacionada no mesmo problema. Quando você reclama, sua mente fica presa no que falta, no que irrita, no que não deu certo. E onde vai seu foco… vai sua energia. Agora imagina trocar o “que saco” por um “o que eu posso aprender com isso?” Foi assim que eu comecei a libertar a minha mente — e a minha vida — de padrões negativos. Porque no fim, é você quem escolhe em que frequência quer viver. Faz esse teste: toda vez que for reclamar, respira e troca por uma pergunta construtiva. Parece simples, mas muda tudo.
